title: MCA § 1-1-102 - How expressed
text:
1-1-102. How expressed. The will of the supreme power is expressed by:

(1) the constitution;

(2) statutes.

History: History: En. Sec. 5151, Pol. C. 1895; re-en. Sec. 3551, Rev. C. 1907; re-en. Sec. 5671, R.C.M. 1921; Cal. Pol. C. Sec. 4467; re-en. Sec. 5671, R.C.M. 1935; R.C.M. 1947, 12-102.
